chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI CP No.D-6734/2020 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA No.19739/2021 (U/A) 2. For orders on CMA No.19740/2021 (Withdrawal) 3. For orderson office objections 14 & 18. 4. For hearing of Main case 12/08/2021: Mr. S. M. Shuja Abbas, advocate for the Petitioner. -.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency application is granted. 2. Counsel for the petitioner under instructions of his client does not press this petition as her grievance stated to have been redressed. Instant petition stands disposed of as not pressed, along with the pending application, if any. JUDGE JUDGE SM
